title: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee.
body_text: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary. The JSON MUST validate against this Pydantic JSON Schema for KnowledgeGraph: { "$defs": { "Edge": { "description": "Edge in a knowledge graph.", "properties": { "source_node_id": { "title": "Source Node Id", "type": "string" }, "target_node_id": { "title": "Target Node Id", "type": "string" }, "relationship_name": { "title": "Relationship Name", "type": "string" }, "properties": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "object" }, { "type": "null" } ], "default": null, "description": "A dictionary of properties associated with the edge.", "title": "Properties" } }, "required": [ "source_node_id", "target_node_id", "relationship_name" ], "title": "Edge", "type": "object" }, "Node": { "description": "Node in a knowledge graph.", "properties": { "id": { "title": "Id", "type": "string" }, "name": { "title": "Name", "type": "string" }, "type": { "title": "Type", "type": "string" }, "description": { "title": "Description", "type": "string" }, "properties": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "object" }, { "type": "null" } ], "default": null, "description": "A dictionary of properties associated with th

frontmatter.title: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee.
frontmatter.summary: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary. The JSON MUST validate against this Pydantic JSON Schema for KnowledgeGraph: { "$defs": { "Edge": { "description": "Edge in a knowledge graph.", "properties": { "source_node_id": { "title": "Source Node Id", "type": "string" }, "target_node_id": { "title": "Target Node Id", "type": "string" }, "relationship_name": { "title": "Relationship Name", "type": "string" }, "properties": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "object" }, { "type": "null" } ], "default": null, "description": "A dictionary of properties associated with the edge.", "title": "Properties" } }, "required": [ "source_node_id", "target_node_id", "relationship_name" ], "title": "Edge", "type": "object" }, "Node": { "description": "Node in a knowledge graph.", "properties": { "id": { "title": "Id", "type": "string" }, "name": { "title": "Name", "type": "string" }, "type": { "title": "Type", "type": "string" }, "description": { "title": "Description", "type": "string" }, "properties": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "object" }, { "type": "null" } ], "default": null, "description": "A dictionary of properties associated with th
commands_run:
python - <<'PY'
import json, collections
from itertools import islice
path='output/cognee_codex_full_bundle/edges.jsonl'
rels=collections.Counter()
prefixes=collections.Counter()
examples={}
with open(path) as f:
    for line in f:
        obj=json.loads(line)
        rel=obj['relationship']
        rels[rel]+=1
        for key in ['source_id','target_id']:
            pref=obj[key].split(':',1)[0]
            prefixes[pref]+=1
        examples.setdefault(rel,obj)
print('RELATIONSHIPS')
for k,v in rels.most_common(20):
    print(k,v)
print('\nPREFIXES')
for k,v in prefixes.most_common(20):
    print(k,v)
print('\nEXAMPLES')
for k in list(examples)[:12]:
    print(k, examples[k])
PY
